title: WII – Consultant C – 1 Posts

basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Consultant - C. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 12-05-2026, and closes on 26-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WII official website wii.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or equivalent, OR Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology with relevant experience, OR Doctoral Degree in Science/Engineering & Technology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Consultant - C Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Wildlife Institute of India Consultant - C Recruitment 2026
